name: @mx-loom/audit
description: mx-loom Postgres audit mirror (T113). The queryable index of the two-tier audit: the substrate (signed Matrix event stream) is truth, this is the searchable mirror. A pure projection (`auditRowFrom`) of every T102 `ToolResult` onto a non-secret `AuditRow`, an injected `AuditSink` port with three adapters (Postgres / in-memory / null), an idempotent exactly-once write path, and a best-effort `withAudit` tap a binding applies once. `pg` is quarantined here — registry/toolbelt gain no dependency.
